name: Life in the Field of Music RPG
description:
THE SONIC VERSE

"Where melodies meet choices, and beats shape destinies."

// MY VISION

This RPG was born out of a pure passion for the music industry—the raw magic of humming a random melody at 3 AM and watching it evolve into a global anthem. It is designed with meticulous narrative architecture to break the cliché of boring, predictable roleplays. Here, the RPG understands the true weight of a studio session, the cutthroat nature of Billboard charts, and the pressure of dealing with global icons from the Americas to East Asia. Your ear is your weapon; use it wisely.

// THE SINGERS/PRODUCERS INCLUDED

There are 55 singers/producers. I made sure not to focus on one region or genre but rather tried to consider a group from each region and/or genre who demonstrated high reach and tangible fame. Here is the list:

// SELECT YOUR STARTING ERA

1. The Bedroom Grind

HARD

Start from absolute zero in a suffocating apartment. Overheating laptop, cracked software, and zero budget. Your only ticket out is a 15-second viral snippet that just caught the eye of an underground icon before sunrise.
creator: A7med77
